race.comment: THESPIAN WATERS (5) is a talented galloper resuming. Long time since a win but no stranger to tougher company than this. Best form is third circuit and goes very well fresh. Wide draw but will be winding up late. TASSIE POWER (15) built on a nice third when fresh from a spell two starts back at this track with success over 1000m at this track two weeks ago, getting home by 1.5 lengths. This harder and tricky gate but has good early speed and will give a sight again. IN THE OCEAN (1) comes here off a break of nine weeks. Scored over 1100m at Launceston to launch the last campaign. Worth plenty of thought. SKY LAND (10) has the ability and is among the leading chances.
